title: Paying Workers on Time: A Torah Obligation
title_zh: 按时支付工人工资:妥拉的义务
author: Torah Light Editorial Team

chinese_historical_parallels.jewish_event: Giving of Torah at Mount Sinai
Late Second Temple Period and Talmudic Era

key_concepts: Bal Talin - Prohibition against withholding wages
Five Torah prohibitions violated by wage withholding
Reciprocal obligations of employers and employees
Modern applications to electronic payments and salaries

cultural_connections.confucian_ethics: 义 (Yi - righteousness) and 仁 (Ren - benevolence)
cultural_connections.shared_values: Dignity of labor, fulfilling obligations, treating others with respect

practical_applications: Immediate payment to contractors and day laborers
Responsible cash flow planning for employers
